title: charactersBase
description: Shema of data structure for the basic information needed to generate a character in battleScissor

XpPoint.description: Current amount of XP point for the character

Strength.description: Base Strength of the character, distributed when leveling up

Intelligence.description: Base intelligence of the character, distributed when leveling up

Constitution.description: Base Constitution of the character, distributed when leveling up

Charisma.description: Base Charisma of the character, distributed when leveling up

Dexterity.description: Base Dexterity of the character, distributed when leveling up

Agility.description: Base Agility of the character, distributed when leveling up

Perception.description: Base Acuity of the character, distributed when leveling up

Power.description: Base Power of the character, distributed when leveling up

Stealth.description: Base Stealth skill of the character, acquired via the background or during the adventure

Medecine.description: Base Medecine skill of the character, acquired via the background or during the adventure

Forge.description: Base forging skill of the character, acquired via the background or during the adventure

Magic.description: Base Magic knowledge of the character, acquired via the background or during the adventure

Demonic.description: Base demonic knowledge of the character, acquired via the background or during the adventure

Cooking.description: Base Cooking skill of the character, acquired via the background or during the adventure

Nature.description: Base knowledge of nature of the character, acquired via the background or during the adventure

Weapon1ID.description: the ID in the table WEAPONS of the first weapon carried by the character, out of 3 maximum

Weapon2ID.description: the ID in the table WEAPONS of the second weapon carried by the character, out of 3 maximum

Weapon3ID.description: the ID in the table WEAPONS of the third weapon carried by the character, out of 3 maximum

equipmentHelmetID.description: the ID in the table EQUIPMENTS of the helmet equiped by the character

equipmentArmorID.description: the ID in the table EQUIPMENTS of the body armor equiped by the character

equipmentPantsID.description: the ID in the table EQUIPMENTS of the pants equiped by the character

equipmentBeltID.description: the ID in the table EQUIPMENTS of the belt equiped by the character

equipmentGauntletID.description: the ID in the table EQUIPMENTS of the right gauntlet equiped by the character

equipmentBootsID.description: the ID in the table EQUIPMENTS of the boots equiped by the character out of 4 maximum

equipmentRing1ID.description: the ID in the table EQUIPMENTS of the first ring equiped by the character out of 4 maximum

equipmentRing2ID.description: the ID in the table EQUIPMENTS of the second ring equiped by the character out of 4 maximum

equipmentNecklaceID.description: the ID in the table EQUIPMENTS of the necklace equiped by the character out of 4 maximum

equipmentShieldID.description: the ID in the table EQUIPMENTS of the shield equiped by the character out of 4 maximum

skill1ID.description: the ID in the table SKILLS of the first skill acquired by the character out of 5 maximum

skill2ID.description: the ID in the table SKILLS of the second skill acquired by the character out of 5 maximum

skill3ID.description: the ID in the table SKILLS of the third skill acquired by the character out of 5 maximum

skill4ID.description: the ID in the table SKILLS of the fourth skill acquired by the character out of 5 maximum

skill5ID.description: the ID in the table SKILLS of the fifth skill acquired by the character out of 5 maximum

skill6ID.description: the ID in the table SKILLS of the sixth skill acquired by the character out of 5 maximum

currentHPLose.description: Current HP of the character, calculated from the Constitution and the equipment

currentManaLose.description: Current Mana of the character, calculated from the Intelligence and the equipment

passive1ID.description: the ID in the table PASSIVES of the first passive acquired by the character out of 5 maximum

passive2ID.description: the ID in the table PASSIVES of the second passive acquired by the character out of 5 maximum

passive3ID.description: the ID in the table PASSIVES of the third passive acquired by the character out of 5 maximum

passive4ID.description: the ID in the table PASSIVES of the fourth passive acquired by the character out of 5 maximum
